identity.name: Business Context Memory Compression Code Analysis

inputs.description: Default metadata-only Django repository fixture bundled with the blueprint.

llm.agent_role: Repo architect, dependency mapper, risk classifier, context compressor, briefing author.

metadata.customizable_for: Architecture review, codebase onboarding, migration planning, technical due diligence, and large-repo code review.
metadata.problem_solved: Large codebases produce more facts than an LLM can safely carry; working memory must preserve source refs, subsystem boundaries, pinned repo facts, and private review notes under tight context budgets.
metadata.target_users: Engineering leaders and platform teams evaluating memory systems for code analysis agents.

outputs.artifact_contract: Compressed code-analysis handoff, final architecture briefing, and context-memory benchmark report.

github_tree_fixture.description: Replace payloads/repo_fixture/django_tree_fixture.json with a tree fixture generated from another repository.

inline_json.description: Load overrides from an inline JSON object.

input_file.description: Load JSON overrides from a local file path.
